summary: An application to connect vocational high school students with local businesses for opportunities. It manages student and business profiles, opportunity listings, and the application process.

entities.name: Student
entities.description: Represents a student at a vocational high school.

entities.name: Business
entities.description: Represents a local business offering opportunities.

entities.name: Opportunity
entities.description: Represents a specific opportunity offered by a business.

entities.name: Application
entities.description: Represents a student's application to an opportunity.

user_flows.name: Student Searching for Opportunities
steps: Student uses search filters (skills, location, industry).
Student selects an opportunity to view details.

user_flows.name: Business Posting an Opportunity
steps: Business creates a new opportunity listing.
Business provides opportunity details (title, description, skills required, application deadline).

user_flows.name: Application Process
steps: Student submits an application for an opportunity.
Business accepts or rejects the application.
Student receives notification of application status.

user_flows.name: Student Profile Creation
steps: Student enters profile information (name, skills, school, areas of interest).

user_flows.name: Business Profile Creation
steps: Business enters profile information (name, industry, location, description).

pages.name: Opportunity Listing Page
pages.description: Displays a list of available opportunities.

pages.name: Opportunity Details Page
pages.description: Displays detailed information about a specific opportunity.

pages.name: Search Results Page
pages.description: Displays search results based on student criteria.

pages.name: Application Management Page (Business)
pages.description: Displays applications received for opportunities posted by the business.

technical_requirements: Database to store student, business, and opportunity data.
Search functionality to allow students to find relevant opportunities.
User authentication and authorization for students and businesses.
Notification system to alert students of new opportunities and application updates.
Profile management for students and businesses.
